pr.title: Non-record: HybridMamba-11 — First SSM with Parallel Associative Scan

output.summary: Hybrid Mamba SSM + Transformer U-Net pairs with a Hillis-Steele parallel associative scan so torch.compile(fullgraph=True) can trace the entire model.
techniques: Hybrid Mamba SSM layers interleaved with Transformer decoder blocks
U-Net skip connections between SSM and Transformer stages
Hillis-Steele parallel associative scan compatible with torch.compile(fullgraph=True)
